description: Playwright MCP-compatible browser automation bridge for CloakBrowser Chromium.
name: io.github.swimmwatch/cloakbrowser-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Bridge browser engine: cloak or playwright.
environmentVariables.name: PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_BROWSER_ENGINE

environmentVariables.description: Run the browser in headless mode.
environmentVariables.name: PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_HEADLESS

environmentVariables.description: Directory inside the container where upstream Playwright MCP writes artifacts.
environmentVariables.name: PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_OUTPUT_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Return snapshots, console logs, and network logs through stdout or files.
environmentVariables.name: PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_OUTPUT_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Patch upstream console message collection for CloakBrowser compatibility.
environmentVariables.name: CLOAK_PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_CONSOLE_FALLBACK

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated or JSON array of extra Chromium launch arguments.
environmentVariables.name: CLOAK_PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_EXTRA_ARGS

title: CloakBrowser MCP
